chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Misc. Application No.S-354 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Priority Case 1.For orders on office objection 2.For hearing of main case 3.For hearing of MA 3184/23 27-11-2023 None present for the applicant. Mr. Shafi Muhammad Mahar, Deputy P.G. ***** None present for the applicant. It appears that since filing of this application, it has not been vigorously pursued. Today, no one is also present. No intimation is received. Accordingly, this Crl. Misc. Application is dismissed for non-prosecution a/w listed application. JUDGE Ahmad
